deployment_question: How does the model perform at future times, new locations, or both?
definition: Hold out future time windows, spatial regions, or combined space-time blocks to match forecast or transfer deployment.

split_operator.spectra_mapping: samples a targeted point over spatial and temporal novelty axes

implementation_recipe: Define whether the deployment target is new-time, new-location, or new-time-and-location.
Construct held-out space-time blocks or forecast horizons.
Report spatial and temporal distance from test samples to training samples.
quality_gates: Avoid random leakage across adjacent space-time neighbors.
Report block size and forecast horizon.
Check covariate drift across time and space.
failure_modes: Space and time shifts can be confounded.
Short forecast horizons can remain high-overlap.
Large blocks can reduce sample size.

citations.title: mlr3spatiotempcv: Spatiotemporal resampling methods
citations.evidence: Provides unified spatiotemporal resampling strategies for machine learning.

citations.title: Adversarial validation for geospatial machine learning prediction
citations.evidence: Quantifies dissimilarity between geospatial training samples and prediction locations.
